features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Sensodyne Daily Care Gentle Whitening Toothpaste provides everyday care for sensitive teeth
Tooth whitening toothpaste that helps to remove stains for naturally whiter teeth
Fluoride toothpaste strengthens enamel for strong teeth and healthy gums*
Protects against tooth decay and promotes gum health for sensitive oral care
Sensodyne Daily Care comes in a tasty mint flavour to leave your mouth feeling clean and fresh
description: Product Description Sensitivity starts with exposed dentine. When enamel is worn away or gums recede, the dentine underneath becomes exposed. Dentine is softer than enamel, making teeth with exposed dentine more vulnerable to future problems. This can lead tooth sensitivity, for example, with hot and cold food and drinks.Sensodyne Daily Care Gentle Whitening toothpaste has been specially formulated for people with sensitive teeth and can be used every day. It provides all the benefits of a regular toothpaste, while providing expert care for sensitive teeth and with twice daily use it helps to bring back the natural whiteness of your teeth. Ingredients Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, Glycerin, Pentasodium Triphosphate, Potassium Nitrate, PEG-6, Aroma, Titanium Dioxide, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Contains Sodium Fluoride 0.306% w/w (1400 ppm Fluoride) Directions HOW TO USE SENSODYNE TOOTHPASTE. Instead of ordinary toothpaste, use Sensodyne Total Care Gentle Whitening 2-4 times daily. ASK YOUR DENTIST. Sensitivity may indicate an underlying problem which needs prompt care by a dentist. See your dentist as soon as possible for advice. Sensodyne Total Care Gentle Whitening is not suitable for children under 7 years old. If using fluoride supplements consult your dentist. As with other toothpastes if irritation occurs discontinue use. The ends of this carton have been glued down. Do not use if carton ends are open. Safety Warning Min Age Limit (Advisory): 7 Years See more
